notes: POC dataset sourced entirely from public/downloaded material, not first-party factory footage: 4 YouTube video clips of the IISCO steel plant + downloaded stock images. This is a deliberate, documented scope decision for this POC (no site access) -- see docs/workflow/dataset_plan.md, docs/reports/recon_findings.md, and the Waivers table in docs/workflow/implementation_plan.md. Not representative of the real deployment camera; treat Phase 3 results accordingly.

sources.capture_date: unknown -- YouTube upload, not first-party capture
sources.camera: unknown -- broadcast camera(s), not a fixed site CCTV camera
sources.area: plant site tour (outdoor) + adjoining meeting room (indoor)
sources.provenance: Public YouTube video of an IISCO site visit. Downloaded for POC pipeline/annotation development. Not consented first-party footage -- do not represent as such in any report.
sources.storage: internal POC use only; no redistribution

sources.storage: internal POC use only; no redistribution

no_helmet_floor.status: NOT MET -- measured 2026-07-16 via scripts/validation/check_dataset.py against real Slice 1.6 labels. Actual no_helmet instance count: 79 (target 150), from only 2 sessions (video_1: 35, s05_stills_no_helmet: 44) -- not the 3 projected. video_2 and video_3 contributed 0 labeled no_helmet instances despite video_2's recon notes describing a bare-headed subject; 2 of the 4 unlabeled orphan images are video_2_frame000360/000380, which may be exactly the bare-headed-subject frames that were missed during labeling. Per docs/workflow/implementation_plan.md Phase 1 gate rules: insufficient no_helmet -> loop back to Slice 1.4 (stage/collect more) or Slice 1.6 (check whether video_2's bare-headed frames were skipped). Do not proceed to Slice 1.8 split until this is resolved or explicitly waived.
